content_body: This is our 3rd year staying at Gary & Lissa's cabins. We have cherished each visit at each cabin. Rolling River cabin is our favorite so far. We look forward to our next visit. We played pool, ate, went tubing, fishing, horseback riding, wave runners. The best part of the whole getaway was my parent's 50th anniversary. Our visit was perfect, as always.
title: 50th Wedding Anniversary in North Georgia
